summary: Re-anchor/measure pass: should_fire/must_not_fire/severity IDENTICAL to label.json on all 3 cases (re-anchor moved block/price/source only; FP-trap now moved Jan-13->Jan-10 as a pure synthetic control, judgment unchanged).
